_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 37 windows producing a ±2+ move and no breaker visible across diverging factors, the coil persists until a catalyst forces a leg up or down.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with medium conviction citing broken analog structure; narrative implies upside bias toward a relief rally. Split favors analyst on trust weight and factor evidence.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed above 40 with btc_momentum_30d above 60 and funding positive confirms Hope leg up; OR fear_greed below 25 with btc_momentum_30d below 35 and funding deeply negative confirms Anxiety/Disbelief leg down
next_move.invalidated_if: score holds 47-54 for next 3-5 days with no factor making a decisive 10+ point move — the coil continues and any directional call was wrong
